components.name: Primary Active Button
components.description: Bold interactive trigger with high contrast.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #ffffff; color: #111111; padding: 12px 24px; font-family: 'Geist', sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.2em; border: none; border-radius: 0px !important; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background-color: #c4c7c8; }

components.name: Tactical Outline Input
components.description: Fine-ruled input block for code entry and searches.
components.css: .ds-input-tactical { background: #111111; color: #e3e2e2; padding: 12px 16px; font-family: 'Geist', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); border-radius: 0px !important; width: 100%; outline: none; } .ds-input-tactical:focus { border-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.4); }

components.name: Steel Container Card
components.description: Deep steel container for grouping content blocks.
components.html:
SPECIMEN // 01

High-performance tactical cargo with integrated harness system.
components.css: .ds-card-steel { background: #111111; border: 1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.1); padding: 16px; border-radius: 0px !important; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Sora', sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 700; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px; color: #ffffff; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Geist', sans-serif; font-size: 12px; line-height: 1.5; color: #c4c7c8; margin: 0; }

narrative.overview: The STITCH DSTRKT design system is structured as a technical, high-performance tactical interface. It prioritizes structure, utility, and precision over decorative styling. The aesthetic simulates schematic architectural drawings and tactical military readouts: featuring sharp borders, structural grids, monospaced-style annotations, and explicit mechanical alignments.
keyCharacteristics: Brutalist Sharpness: Every single container, button, and input has a zero-radius (0px) sharp corner.
Structural Blueprint Mesh: A subtle geometric background grid overlay (40px) defines the canvas.
Tactical Utility Details: Display of structural metadata like system coordinates, ping pulses, and active keys.

rules.name: The Monochrome Restraint Rule
rules.body: Saturated colors are strictly forbidden for decorative accents. Color is exclusively used to communicate real status.

rules.name: The Shadow Proscription Rule
rules.body: Drop shadows are completely prohibited. Depth is structural (Tonal Grid Layering), not ambient.

dos: Do force sharp corners (border-radius: 0px !important) on all active UI blocks, cards, badges, and modals.
Do align components strictly to the 40px x 40px layout grid established by the background mesh.
Do frame sections with fine, 1px solid tactical outlines instead of box shadows.
donts: Don't use any rounded corners (border-radius > 0px), even subtle 2px or 4px radii.
Don't use ambient drop shadows (box-shadow) to create floating cards.
Don't animate image scale, rotation, or translation on hover. Keep images stable.
